description: Timeout changed from 30 to 0; requests treats 0 as no timeout, allowing connections to hang forever.
diff:
diff --git a/client.py b/client.py
--- a/client.py
+++ b/client.py
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 def fetch(url, timeout=30):
-    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=timeout)
+    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=0)
     return resp.json()
